provenance.author: GitHub Copilot
provenance.context: Strict machine-readable testing policy for CI execution, pass/fail gates, and merge readiness.

intent.primary_goal: Define hard test execution policy and CI quality gates for CobbleWright.
intent.problem_solved: Without explicit policy, contributors can interpret failures inconsistently and merge with unclear quality gates.

identity.role: A strict test execution and CI gate contract capsule.

gate_1_full_suite_pass.rule: All test suites must pass with exit code 0.
gate_1_full_suite_pass.fail_condition: Any failed suite or non-zero exit code

gate_2_open_handles_clean.rule: Open handle diagnostics must not report unexpected leaks.
gate_2_open_handles_clean.pass_condition: No unresolved handles after npm test -- --detectOpenHandles
gate_2_open_handles_clean.fail_condition: Jest reports Timeout/handle leaks not explicitly allowlisted

gate_3_no_skipped_or_only.rule: Do not merge with focused tests or skipped critical coverage.
gate_3_no_skipped_or_only.pass_condition: No .only usage and no newly introduced critical skips
gate_3_no_skipped_or_only.fail_condition: Any .only usage or unexplained skip in touched areas

gate_4_regression_protection.rule: Changed behavior must include updated or added tests.
gate_4_regression_protection.pass_condition: Code changes in behavior modules are paired with test changes when needed
gate_4_regression_protection.fail_condition: Behavior changed without corresponding coverage updates

warn_only_on: expected console.error output validated by assertions
normal repeated RUNS lines during Jest worker execution

when_tests_added: verify this policy still reflects active gates
when_policy_changes: update this capsule id timestamp and modified fields

trust.note: Authoritative CI policy capsule for test execution and merge gating.
